title: dialium occidentale
intro: Dialium occidentale, also known as the African ironwood, is a medicinal tree native to West Africa, characterized by its hard, heavy wood and edible seeds. The medicinal properties of Dialium occidentale include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Dialium occidentale can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used to make ointments and salves for topical application.
